summary: Iteration 87: Testing redesigned 'Documentazione Aziendale' module at /sistema-qualita with new Table-based layout. All 14 test features verified successfully. The page now uses Shadcn Table with dark header (bg-[#1E293B]), Card-wrapped filter toolbar with Search Input + Select dropdown, standard H1 header with subtitle count, and correctly colored category badges.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
Table layout with dark header (bg-[#1E293B]) and white text working correctly
Category filtering via Select dropdown works correctly
Search functionality filters documents by title, tags, and filename
Upload dialog has all required elements: drop zone, title input, category select, tags input
Delete dialog shows red title and destructive button styling
Category badge colors correctly implemented: Manuali=blue, Procedure=amber, Certificazioni=emerald, Template=violet
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_Documento di Test Playwright during upload/delete flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: The 'Sistema Qualita' / 'Documentazione Aziendale' module has been redesigned from card grid to Table layout. Page at /sistema-qualita. Key data-testids: quality-system-page, search-docs, btn-upload-doc, filter-category, doc-row-{id}, btn-download-{id}, btn-delete-{id}, upload-dialog, drop-zone, input-upload-title, select-upload-category, input-upload-tags, btn-confirm-upload, delete-dialog, btn-confirm-delete. Use [role='option'] selector for dropdown items to avoid conflicts with table badges.

features_verified.page_load: PASS - /sistema-qualita loads with 'Documentazione Aziendale' title and '4 documenti in archivio' subtitle
features_verified.table_layout: PASS - Table with dark header row (bg-[#1E293B]) showing columns: Nome Documento, Categoria, Data, Tipo, Dimensione
features_verified.documents_display: PASS - 4 documents displayed (Template Rapporto NCR, Certificato ISO 9001, WPS Procedura Saldatura, Manuale Qualita EN 1090-1)
features_verified.filter_manuali: PASS - Filtering by 'Manuali Qualita' shows only 1 document (Manuale Qualita EN 1090-1)
features_verified.filter_certificazioni: PASS - Filtering by 'Certificazioni' shows only 1 document (Certificato ISO 9001)
features_verified.filter_reset: PASS - Resetting to 'Tutte le categorie' shows all 4 documents
features_verified.search_clear: PASS - Clearing search returns all 4 documents
features_verified.upload_dialog: PASS - Opens with drop zone, title input, category select, tags input, confirm button
features_verified.document_upload: PASS - File uploads successfully, appears in table, dialog closes with success toast
features_verified.delete_dialog: PASS - Opens with red title 'Elimina Documento' and destructive confirm button
features_verified.document_delete: PASS - Document deleted, removed from table, success toast shown
features_verified.download_button: PASS - Download buttons present and enabled for each document

tests: Table layout with dark header verification
